videoData.video_title: Buying a Boring Business the Smart Way

script_sections.text: The best acquisitions look boring before they look rich.
A disciplined buyer maps the pipeline, vets the operator, and protects downside before chasing upside.
Seller financing changes the structure of the deal and lowers the cash needed at close.
Review earnings quality, customer concentration, owner dependence, and transition risk.

affiliate_mentions.reason: Keeps the acquisition process organized without drowning in spreadsheets.
affiliate_mentions.disclosure: Affiliate link may be included in the description.
